title: 🪬 Mythic Attractors
name: Mythic Attractors
what_it_is: Fractal attractors that correspond not to simple physical systems, but to archetypes, moods, or mythic frequencies—psycho-fractals.
how_to_use: her form is drawn to the mythic attractor of the Trickster—chaotic folds bloom around her path
his crown resonates with the Warrior attractor—geometry hardens in sharp fractal platelets
animation_behavior: Attractors shift based on identity, personality overlays modulate geometry, mythic presence flickers between forms
